source: TARGET-SCALE DROP-IN PLUMBING VALIDATION — synthetic floats (NOT a real 9B measurement). The candidate/surrogate losses are chosen only for a clear separation that replays to SURPASSES, so the verdict and CI bounds above are recomputed faithfully from those losses. This file exists to prove scripts/replay_freeze_valid_loss_ci upgrades a proxy_scale=false recording to the TARGET_SCALE scale label with no code change (the MS-PF2 Cat-C contract) — the branch the real proxy fixture (proxy_scale=true) never exercises. ``synthetic: true`` is the machine-readable provenance tag that withholds the citable 'this verdict IS the §4 target-scale result' claim: the replay judge still flips the scale label to TARGET and recomputes the SURPASSES verdict faithfully, but a synthetic recording is never presentable as a real §4 result (see the SYNTHETIC note the replay emits on this file). Do NOT cite these numbers as a 9B result; the real target-scale run will overwrite this file with genuine 9B floats in the same schema (carrying ``synthetic: false`` / omitting it) and the SYNTHETIC note will drop.
